title: The Dancing Heart
content:
When she came she said:
    You know that your love is granted,
    Why is your heart trembling?

    And I:
    You are bringing joy for my heart
    And so my heart is dancing.

    From the Arabic of Urak El Hutail.
meaning:
"The Dancing Heart" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
